title: Ramayapatnam Beach
tagline: Ramayapatnam Beach — beach town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Ramayapatnam Beach is located on the coast of Bay of Bengal, in Prakasam district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Gollapalem
topPlaces.description: Pedda Gollapalem is a village in Nidamarru hamlet, Kruthivennu mandal, located in Krishna district on the sea coast of Bay of Bengal, Andhra Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Mogalthur mandal
topPlaces.description: Mogalthur mandal is one of the 19 mandals in the West Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is administered under the Narasapuram revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Mogalthuru
topPlaces.description: Mogalthuru is a village in West Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It was a princely estate during the British rule.

topPlaces.name: Gollapalem Island
topPlaces.description: Chinna Gollapalem Island is a river delta island formed by the Upputeru Rivulet in Andhra Pradesh, India. The island is located in the Kruthivennu mandal of Krishna District.

topPlaces.name: Kalipatnam
topPlaces.description: Kalipatnam is a village in West godavari district of the Indian state Andhra Pradesh. Lankalakoderu railway Station, Narasapur railway Station are the nearest railway stations.

items.note: Pedda Gollapalem is a village in Nidamarru hamlet, Kruthivennu mandal, located in Krishna district on the sea coast of Bay of Bengal, Andhra Pradesh, India.
Mogalthur mandal is one of the 19 mandals in the West Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is administered under the Narasapuram revenue division.
Mogalthuru is a village in West Godavari district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It was a princely estate during the British rule.
Chinna Gollapalem Island is a river delta island formed by the Upputeru Rivulet in Andhra Pradesh, India. The island is located in the Kruthivennu mandal of Krishna District.
Kalipatnam is a village in West godavari district of the Indian state Andhra Pradesh. Lankalakoderu railway Station, Narasapur railway Station are the nearest railway stations.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ramayapatnam Beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ramayapatnam Beach is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ramayapatnam Beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vijayawada Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ramayapatnam Beach?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ramayapatnam Beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ramayapatnam Beach?
faq.a: Stays in Ramayapatnam Beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ramayapatnam Beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gollapalem, Mogalthur mandal, Mogalthuru, Gollapalem Island, Kalipatnam.
